# Asset Attribution

Assets in this folder are derived from or sourced from:

- Book: *Digital Image Processing (3rd Edition)*
- Authors: Rafael C. Gonzalez, Richard E. Woods, Steven L. Eddins
- Publisher: Pearson Education
- Copyright: © Pearson Education and respective copyright holders
- ISBN: 978-0131687288

Some assets located in the `edit/` subdirectories are modified versions of the original images. These modifications were created for educational, illustrative, and experimental purposes. Copyright ownership of the original images remains with their respective copyright holders.
